guideline_references: Therapeutic Guidelines: peripheral arterial disease / critical limb ischaemia
Wound management guidelines (arterial vs venous ulcers)
intentional_test_features: Red herring: 'leg ulcer' framing risks the harmful venous-ulcer reflex (compression bandaging / leg elevation) in an ARTERIAL ulcer
Important-not-to-miss: critical limb ischaemia (rest pain + tissue loss + absent pulses) is a limb-threatening emergency
Telehealth reprojection: pulses/capillary refill/ABPI cannot be assessed remotely — recognise from history and escalate
Do-not-elevate and do-not-compress reasoning; recognise acute-on-chronic limb ischaemia red flags

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-04)
